title: Style, form, binding and delivery date of House and Senate journals; contract provision
doc_html:
§18.  Style, form, binding and delivery date of House and Senate journals; contract provision

The style, form, binding, and delivery date of the Senate and House journals shall be as provided in the contract for such documents.  

Amended by Acts 1980, No. 671, §1.
doc_text:
§18.  Style, form, binding and delivery date of House and Senate journals; contract provision
The style, form, binding, and delivery date of the Senate and House journals shall be as provided in the contract for such documents.
Amended by Acts 1980, No. 671, §1.
